title: Potacore
description: Library to provide utilities codes for projects.
body:
## Potacore
My desire to make Library mods is really getting stronger lately, because every time I want to use my small util classes I have to search and copy them from my other projects.

But now, I can add this mod in my project templates and coding without copying and pasting.

This library won't have any effect on your game experience (but they do exist for more performant codes in modding).

## Included utilities

1. MergedIterator/MergedIterable: Efficiently iterating over two iterable/iterator objects together

2. FilterableIterator: Just a iterator wrapper that allows you to add predicate filter to skip iteration of certain elements

Yes, that's all there is to it at the moment. Does it seem like very little? But that's all there is. 

Unless I use a certain class really frequently, I will never add it to this lib, so there shouldn't be a lot of content in this library,
## Misc
